title: RapsolCrossbowIndicator
description: Highlights crossbow slots based on their enchantments
body:
# Rapsol Crossbow Indictor  

This mod highlights crossbow slots based on their enchantments for quick identification:  

- 🔴  for **Multishot** crossbows  
- 🟢  for **Piercing** crossbows  

### ✅ Features  
✔ Instantly distinguish between crossbows at a glance  
✔ No need to hover over each crossbow to check enchantments  
✔ Enhances inventory organization and combat efficiency  
✔ Works on **Survival** and on **Sevrers**  

Stop wasting time searching for the right crossbow - this mod makes switching between them **faster and easier**!
